hypothesis: L-1130 (citation missing-edges) and L-1131 (anti-attractor colony design) bridge via M3 reward targeting — recombination candidates ARE automated anti-attractor targets
method: knowledge_recombine.py top-1 candidate pair analysis + cross-citation synthesis

finding.bridge: Recombination candidates serve as automated M3 targets for L-1131 colony design. The citation graph's missing edges prescribe where colony work should route. This converts advisory (run recombine) into structural enforcement (declare recombination target at lane opening).
mechanism_chain: missing edges = attention gaps = degenerative symmetry breaks (L-1124)
L-1129 prescribes Goldstone rotations for Goldstone-mode breaks
recombination IS a Goldstone rotation rebalancing domain attention
wiring into M3 makes rotation structural (L-601 creation-time enforcement)

structural_change_proposed: Wire knowledge_recombine.py top-3 candidates into dispatch_optimizer.py as M3 DOMEX targets
falsification: DOMEX sessions targeting recombination candidates produce lower Sharpe than frontier-targeted sessions
